title: Comprehensive Project Lifecycle Management Features
description: This feature set introduces essential project lifecycle management capabilities including project duplication, archiving, and an undo/redo mechanism for critical project actions. It will empower users to efficiently manage their projects from creation to completion, prevent accidental data loss, and maintain an organized workspace.
implementation_idea: Implement project duplication and archiving functionalities within the ProjectsPage (app/(protected)/projects/page.tsx) by adding new API endpoints and UI actions. For the undo/redo, integrate a global state management solution (e.g., Redux middleware) to track and revert changes for key project operations across relevant pages like ProjectsPage and WorkflowsPage (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/workflows/page.tsx).
expected_impact: Reduce user-reported data loss incidents by 90%, decrease time spent on project setup by 50% through duplication, and improve overall project management efficiency and user satisfaction.

title: Auto-Save for LogicForm Editor
description: Implement an automatic saving mechanism for the LogicForm editor that periodically saves the user's input to local storage or Redux state. This ensures that even if a user switches tabs or navigates away, their work is preserved and can be restored upon returning to the editor.
implementation_idea: Integrate a debounce function within the LogicForm component (components/config-forms/LogicForm.tsx) to save the current editor content to Redux state or local storage every few seconds. This saved state can then be reloaded when the component mounts or regains focus, ensuring continuity within ApiBuilderContent (components/api-builder-content.tsx).
expected_impact: Eliminate data loss for users editing logic code, significantly reducing frustration and improving productivity, especially for users who frequently switch tabs.

title: Onboarding Checklist Auto-Clear on Completion
description: This feature will automatically mark the onboarding checklist as complete and remove it from the user's view once all required steps have been successfully performed. It ensures a consistent and accurate user experience, preventing the checklist from lingering incorrectly.
implementation_idea: Upon successful completion of the onboarding flow handled by `app/onboarding/page.tsx`, trigger the `CompleteOnboardingRoute` (app/api/auth/complete-onboarding/route.ts) to update the user's onboarding status and clear any client-side checklist display flags.
expected_impact: Eliminate user confusion regarding onboarding status and improve the perceived polish of the application, reducing user frustration by 100% for this specific issue.

title: Enhanced Mobile Accessibility & UI Contrast Mode
description: This feature will introduce a dedicated mobile accessibility mode with improved touch target sizes, scrollable area adjustments, and a high-contrast theme. It will ensure all interactive elements are clearly distinguishable and functional on mobile devices, addressing issues for users with visual impairments and general mobile usability.
implementation_idea: Implement responsive design adjustments within components like FeedbackSheet (components/feedback-sheet.tsx) and SupportPage (app/(protected)/support/page.tsx) to optimize touch targets and scrolling. Introduce a toggleable high-contrast theme, potentially managed via Redux, that modifies CSS variables for color schemes across the application, including the RejectedAccessPage (app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx) for consistent branding.
expected_impact: Improve mobile usability and accessibility scores by 40%, reducing user frustration and support requests related to mobile experience by 25%.

title: Extend Email Verification Link Expiration to 60 Minutes
description: This feature will increase the expiration time for email verification links from 10 minutes to 60 minutes. This gives users a more reasonable window to access and click the verification link, accommodating real-world interruptions like meetings without forcing them to restart the verification process.
implementation_idea: Update the backend logic responsible for generating and validating OTPs to set the expiration time to 60 minutes. The `VerifyOtpForm` (components/auth/verify-otp-form.tsx) and `VerifyOtpPage` (app/auth/verify-otp/page.tsx) will automatically benefit from this backend change without requiring significant frontend modifications, as they primarily handle OTP input and submission.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration and drop-off during the email verification process by an estimated 20-30%, leading to higher successful account creations and password resets.

title: Collection Data CSV Export
description: This feature will enable users to export the data displayed on the CollectionDataPage directly into a CSV format. It will provide a simple, one-click solution for users to download their collection data, addressing the critical need for weekly reporting and external data analysis.
implementation_idea: Add an 'Export to CSV' button on the CollectionDataPage (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/[secretId]/[collectionName]/page.tsx). This button will trigger a client-side function to format the currently displayed collection data into a CSV string and initiate a file download.
expected_impact: Enable users to perform essential weekly reporting and data analysis, significantly improving their workflow and reducing frustration, potentially increasing user retention by addressing a critical 'dealbreaker' feature.

title: Extend Session Timeout with Activity Monitoring
description: This feature will extend the default session timeout duration and implement client-side activity monitoring to automatically refresh the user's session, preventing premature logouts during active use. Users will no longer lose unsaved work due to aggressive timeouts.
implementation_idea: Modify the cookie expiry in OauthSessionRoute (app/api/auth/oauth/session/route.ts) to a longer duration (e.g., 7 days). Implement client-side activity tracking within AppTopbar (components/app-topbar.tsx) to periodically ping a lightweight API endpoint (not provided, but would be a new endpoint) to refresh the session token, preventing the session from expiring while the user is active. The LogoutRoute (app/api/auth/logout/route.ts) will remain for explicit user logout.
expected_impact: Reduce reported instances of aggressive session timeouts by 100% and significantly decrease user frustration and loss of unsaved work.

title: Enhanced Global Search with Tag Indexing
description: This feature will overhaul the existing search mechanism to accurately return relevant results for exact matches and integrate user-applied tags into the search index. Users will be able to find projects, documents, and other content efficiently using both keywords and their custom tags, significantly improving content discoverability and organization.
implementation_idea: Refactor the search logic within `SearchDialog` to ensure accurate keyword matching and extend its indexing capabilities to include user-applied tags from components like `ApiDocsPage`. This will involve updating the data fetching and filtering mechanisms to query a comprehensive, tag-indexed dataset.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration with search by 90%, improve content retrieval efficiency by 70%, and make user-applied tags fully functional for content organization.

title: Dashboard Project Filtering and Pagination
description: Implement robust filtering and pagination capabilities on the projects dashboard to allow users to view and manage a subset of their projects at a time. This will significantly reduce the data loaded and processed, improving performance for users with large project portfolios.
implementation_idea: Modify `app/(protected)/projects/page.tsx` to include server-side pagination and filtering options for project data. The `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/dashboard/page.tsx` component will then consume a paginated and filtered project list, reducing the initial data load for dashboard rendering.
expected_impact: Reduce dashboard load times by over 70% for users with more than 50 projects, preventing timeouts and making the dashboard usable for large teams.

title: Third-Party Integration Hub
description: This feature will introduce a dedicated section where users can connect their projects with essential third-party tools like Slack and Jira. It will enable automated notifications, synchronized issue tracking, and streamlined data flow, significantly reducing manual effort and improving workflow efficiency.
implementation_idea: A new 'Integrations' tab will be added to the project settings, likely accessible from the `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/dashboard/page.tsx` or `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/workflows/page.tsx` context. This tab will host UI for configuring API keys and webhooks for services like Slack and Jira, allowing workflows managed by `WorkflowsPage` to trigger actions or send notifications to these external platforms.
expected_impact: Reduce manual data transfer and duplicated effort by 50%, improving user satisfaction and workflow efficiency.

title: Network Status and Retry Mechanism for Data Loading
description: This feature will detect network connectivity issues during data loading and display a user-friendly message with a 'Retry' option. It will prevent indefinite loading spinners and provide users with immediate feedback and a way to recover from temporary network problems.
implementation_idea: Modify the `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/[secretId]/[collectionName]/loading.tsx` component to detect network status. If offline or a network request fails, display an error message and a retry button. The retry action will re-attempt the data fetch.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration by providing clear feedback during network issues and empower users to self-recover, potentially decreasing support tickets related to 'infinite loading' by 20%.

title: Dark Mode Toggle
description: This feature will introduce a toggle allowing users to switch between light and dark themes. This will alleviate eye strain for users working in low-light conditions or at night, improving comfort and productivity.
implementation_idea: Implement a user interface toggle that dispatches a theme update action. This action will call the `UpdateThemeRoute` (app/api/user/update-theme/route.ts) to persist the user's theme preference, and apply the chosen theme globally across the application, including components like `RejectedAccessPage` (app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx).
expected_impact: Reduce eye strain for users by providing a dark mode option, leading to improved user comfort and potentially increased session duration, especially during nighttime use.

title: Enhanced Comment Notification Settings & Debugging
description: This feature will introduce a dedicated section within project settings for configuring comment notification preferences, including a 'test notification' option. It will help users verify their notification setup and troubleshoot issues directly.
implementation_idea: We will extend the SettingsPage (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/settings/page.tsx) to include a new 'Notifications' tab. This tab will allow users to configure email notification triggers for comments and include a 'Send Test Email' button that triggers a backend service to send a sample notification.
expected_impact: Reduce user complaints about missing comment notifications by 50% and improve team collaboration by ensuring timely feedback visibility.

title: Notion Import Status & Retry Mechanism
description: This feature will provide real-time feedback on the Notion import status, including progress updates and clear error messages if the import fails or gets stuck. Users will also have the option to retry the import directly from the status page, preventing indefinite 'processing' states.
implementation_idea: Introduce a new UI component, potentially leveraging the structure of `app/request-access/pending/page.tsx` for status polling, to display the Notion import progress. If the import fails or times out, display an error message and a retry button, similar to how `app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx` informs users and offers next steps. The loading state in `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/[secretId]/[collectionName]/loading.tsx` could be enhanced to show a more specific import-in-progress indicator.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration by providing transparency into the Notion import process and enable users to self-resolve import issues, thereby increasing successful Notion data transfers by an estimated 25%.

title: Automated API Documentation Generation and Validation
description: This feature will automatically generate and update API documentation based on the actual deployed API endpoints and their schemas. It will also include a validation step to ensure the generated documentation accurately reflects the live API behavior, significantly reducing discrepancies and developer frustration.
implementation_idea: Integrate a build-time or runtime process to introspect deployed API endpoints and their responses, generating OpenAPI/Swagger specifications. This specification would then be used to dynamically update the documentation displayed by `ApiDocsPanel` and `ApiDocsPage`, ensuring `DocsSidebar` always lists accurate workflows. A validation mechanism would compare documented schemas against live API responses.
expected_impact: Reduce API integration issues by 50% and eliminate user complaints about outdated documentation.

title: Enhanced 2FA Setup with Real-time Feedback and Troubleshooting
description: This feature will provide users with immediate, actionable feedback during the 2FA setup process, guiding them through common issues and offering self-service troubleshooting steps. It aims to reduce setup failures and the need for support intervention by making the process more transparent and user-friendly.
implementation_idea: Enhance the `VerifyOtpForm` (components/auth/verify-otp-form.tsx) to display specific error messages returned from the `VerifyOtpRoute` (app/api/auth/verify-otp/route.ts) and suggest troubleshooting steps directly on the `VerifyOtpPage` (app/auth/verify-otp/page.tsx). This includes adding logic for common failure scenarios like incorrect OTP, expired OTP, or rate limiting.
expected_impact: Reduce 2FA setup failures by 50% and decrease support tickets related to 2FA verification by 30%.

title: Direct File Attachment to Documentation Items
description: This feature will enable users to directly attach files (e.g., screenshots, specification documents) to items displayed within the application's documentation pages. This eliminates the need for external tools, streamlining the documentation process and keeping all relevant information consolidated within the platform.
implementation_idea: Integrate a file upload mechanism into relevant documentation components like `DocPage` and potentially `ApiDocsPage`, allowing users to attach files. Store file metadata in the database, linking it to the specific documentation item, and provide a display mechanism for attached files.
expected_impact: Improve user efficiency and satisfaction by centralizing documentation assets, reducing reliance on external tools, and enhancing the completeness of in-app documentation.

title: Keyboard-Navigable Date Picker with Direct Input
description: This feature will enhance the date picker component by enabling full keyboard navigation and direct date input. Users will be able to type dates directly into an input field or use arrow keys to navigate the calendar, significantly speeding up date selection, especially for distant dates.
implementation_idea: Integrate a date input field that accepts direct keyboard entry and parse the input for validation. Enhance the existing date picker UI to respond to keyboard events (e.g., arrow keys for navigation, Enter for selection) within the component, similar to how interactive elements are handled in components like SearchDialog.
expected_impact: Reduce time spent selecting dates by an estimated 50% for users who prefer keyboard input or need to select distant dates.

title: Enhanced Multi-Criteria Filtering for DatabasePage
description: This feature will enable users to apply multiple filter criteria simultaneously on the DatabasePage, such as combining date ranges with specific tags or database types. This will significantly improve the precision of search results, allowing users to quickly locate specific databases within large datasets.
implementation_idea: Modify the filtering logic within DatabasePage (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/page.tsx) to support an array of active filters, allowing for the simultaneous application of different filter types. The UI would need to be updated to allow users to select and manage multiple active filters, similar to how SearchDialog (components/docs/search-dialog.tsx) might handle multiple search facets.
expected_impact: Reduce time spent searching for specific databases by 50% for users with complex filtering needs, leading to increased user satisfaction and efficiency.

title: Team Invitation and Workspace Sharing
description: This feature will allow users to invite teammates to their workspace and share specific projects or workflows. It will enable real-time collaboration, breaking down isolated workflows and fostering a more integrated project development environment.
implementation_idea: Integrate an invitation flow within the existing access management system, potentially extending the functionality of `RequestAccessPage` to include 'invite' capabilities. New invited users would then gain access to shared projects, visible on `WorkflowsPage`.
expected_impact: Increase team collaboration and project sharing by 50%, reducing isolated workflows and improving overall project efficiency.

title: Manual Item Reordering with Drag-and-Drop
description: This feature will enable users to manually reorder items within lists using drag-and-drop functionality, overriding the default sorting. It will allow users to prioritize and organize content in a way that best suits their individual needs, improving personal workflow efficiency.
implementation_idea: Implement drag-and-drop functionality for list items, potentially within components like `DocsSidebar` where ordered lists of workflows are displayed. This would involve adding state management for custom order and persisting user preferences.
expected_impact: Increase user satisfaction by providing personalized content organization and reduce frustration related to fixed sorting by ~25%.

title: Data Visualization Fallback and Error Reporting
description: This feature will introduce a robust fallback mechanism for chart components, displaying a user-friendly message and a 'Report Issue' button when data visualization fails. It will also capture and report technical details of the rendering failure to help diagnose and fix the root cause.
implementation_idea: Enhance `TopWorkflowsChart.tsx`, `SuccessFailChart.tsx`, and `RequestsByMethodChart.tsx` to include a more detailed error boundary or fallback UI. This fallback will display a 'Visualization Unavailable' message, offer a 'Report Issue' button that captures component state and error details, and log these errors for developer review.
expected_impact: Improve user experience by providing clear feedback when visualizations fail, reduce user frustration by offering a direct way to report issues, and accelerate debugging by providing detailed error context, leading to a ~50% reduction in unaddressed data visualization bugs.

title: Project-Level Activity Log
description: This feature introduces a dedicated activity log for each project, allowing users to view a chronological record of all significant changes made within that project. It will provide transparency into team activities, helping users understand who did what and when, thereby improving collaboration and accountability.
implementation_idea: Integrate a 'View Activity Log' button or link on the ProjectsPage (app/(protected)/projects/page.tsx) for each project, leading to the existing Page (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/log/page.tsx). This page will be enhanced to display a comprehensive log of project-level events, distinct from workflow-specific logs handled by WorkflowLogsPage.
expected_impact: Increase project transparency and team accountability, reducing user frustration related to unknown project changes by 50%.

title: Keyboard Command Palette
description: Implement a global command palette accessible via a keyboard shortcut (e.g., Cmd+K or Ctrl+K) that allows users to quickly search and navigate to different pages, features, or documentation sections. This will significantly improve efficiency for power users who prefer keyboard-first workflows.
implementation_idea: Introduce a new client-side component for the command palette, dynamically imported and integrated into the main layout defined in 'app/page.tsx'. This palette will leverage the navigation data used by 'components/docs/navigation.tsx' for search functionality and provide direct links to various application routes, including 'app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx' and other core pages.
expected_impact: Increase navigation efficiency for power users by an estimated 40-50%, reducing reliance on mouse-driven interactions and improving overall user satisfaction for keyboard-first users.

title: CSV Import Pre-validation and Error Reporting
description: Implement a pre-validation step during CSV import that checks for common parsing issues like unescaped commas within text fields. If issues are detected, the system will notify the user with specific row numbers and offer options to correct or proceed with warnings, preventing silent data loss.
implementation_idea: Introduce a client-side pre-processing step before actual data submission, potentially leveraging a web worker for large files, to scan the CSV for unescaped commas. If errors are found, display a modal with details, possibly integrating with the existing UI flow around app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx for error display patterns, or a new dedicated error component, while app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/[secretId]/[collectionName]/loading.tsx could be enhanced to show specific validation progress.
expected_impact: Eliminate silent data loss during CSV imports, significantly improving data integrity and user trust, and reducing support tickets related to import failures by at least 50%.

title: Freemium Tier with Feature Exploration
description: Introduce a freemium tier that allows users to sign up and explore core product features without requiring credit card information upfront. This enables users to experience the product's value proposition before committing to a paid subscription, addressing their desire to 'try before they buy'.
implementation_idea: Modify `app/auth/signup/page.tsx` to include an option for a 'Free Trial' or 'Explore' signup path that bypasses credit card collection. The `app/api/auth/signup/route.ts` would need to handle this new signup type, creating an account with limited access permissions. The system would then direct users to a 'Freemium Dashboard' instead of immediately prompting for payment.
expected_impact: Increase signup conversion rates by allowing users to explore the product, potentially reducing initial signup abandonment by 20-30% and improving user satisfaction with the onboarding process.

title: Post-Signup Interactive Onboarding Checklist
description: Implement an interactive, step-by-step onboarding checklist that appears immediately after a user successfully signs up. This checklist will guide new users through essential initial actions, making their first experience clear and engaging.
implementation_idea: After successful signup handled by `SignUpPage` and `SignupRoute`, redirect users to a dedicated onboarding page that displays an interactive checklist. This page will track user progress through key actions like 'Set up your profile' or 'Create your first project'.
expected_impact: Reduce post-signup confusion and early user abandonment by ~25%, increasing user activation rates.

title: Contextual AI Suggestion Engine for Workflow Optimization
description: This feature will enhance AI suggestions by integrating deeper contextual analysis from user workflow data and application usage. It will provide more personalized, non-obvious recommendations for optimizing workflows, identifying potential bottlenecks, or suggesting underutilized features, moving beyond generic advice to actionable insights.
implementation_idea: Enhance the AI suggestion logic to ingest data from components like `TopWorkflowsChart` to understand user workflow patterns. The AI model would then generate more specific suggestions, potentially displayed on `Home` or relevant dashboard sections, by analyzing these patterns against best practices or common inefficiencies.
expected_impact: Increase user satisfaction with AI suggestions by providing 50% more actionable and novel insights, leading to improved workflow efficiency and feature adoption.

title: Real-time Project Presence and Concurrent Editing Indicators
description: This feature will display real-time presence indicators for users actively viewing or editing a project, workflow, or database collection. It will prevent accidental overwrites by showing who is currently working on the same item and provide warnings or lock mechanisms for concurrent editing scenarios.
implementation_idea: Integrate a WebSocket service to broadcast user presence and activity. Update components like `ProjectsPage`, `WorkflowsPage`, and potentially the loading state in `app/(protected)/projects/[id]/database/[secretId]/[collectionName]/loading.tsx` to display user avatars or names for active collaborators, and implement optimistic locking or merging strategies for concurrent edits.
expected_impact: Reduce accidental overwrites by 90% and improve collaboration efficiency by providing clear visibility into team activity.

title: Enhanced Bulk Action Processing with Pagination and Select All
description: This feature will allow users to select and process more than 10 items at a time within the bulk actions interface. It will introduce pagination controls and a 'Select All' option to enable efficient updates for large datasets, significantly reducing the manual effort required for users with hundreds of entries.
implementation_idea: Modify the data fetching and selection logic within the WorkflowsPage (app/(protected)/projects/[id]/workflows/page.tsx) to support pagination and a 'Select All' option for items displayed. Update the bulk action dispatch mechanism to handle larger arrays of selected items, potentially introducing an asynchronous processing queue if direct synchronous updates become a performance bottleneck.
expected_impact: Reduce the time spent on bulk updates by users with large datasets by at least 80%, improving overall efficiency and user satisfaction for high-volume operations.

title: Proactive Billing & Subscription Notification System
description: This feature will implement a system to send timely, clear notifications to users regarding upcoming free trial expirations, automatic subscription renewals, and any changes to their pricing plan. It will ensure users are well-informed before any charges occur or features become paywalled.
implementation_idea: Integrate a notification service to send emails and in-app alerts. For free trial expirations and upcoming renewals, a banner or modal could be displayed on the 'Home' (app/page.tsx) or 'RejectedAccessPage' (app/request-access/rejected/page.tsx) components, directing users to their billing settings or 'SupportPage' (app/(protected)/support/page.tsx) for more information.
expected_impact: Reduce unexpected charges and feature paywall complaints by at least 80%, improving user trust and satisfaction.
